title: Quiz Option
description: A possible answer choice for a multiple choice question. Options are defined inline in question arrays within chapter.yml files.

index.description: Sequential index within the options array (0-based). Auto-generated by tpm build if not provided.

text.description: The option text displayed to the learner.

correct.description: Whether this option is a correct answer. For SINGLE type questions, exactly one option should be correct. For MULTIPLE type questions, one or more options can be correct.
